item.title: Notes from the first Joyboydata build
item.description:
Joyboydata is a small lab for building and writing about modern data systems. The work is a mix of architecture experiments, careful tooling choices, and the occasional contrarian take when common patterns feel too heavy.

What you can expect here:

  • Practical notes on data modeling, segmentation, and activation
  • Postmortems on decisions that worked (and the ones that did not)
  • Lightweight tooling patterns that respect constraints and focus

If you want updates, the RSS feed is the most reliable way to follow along.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Email is the fastest way to start.

If you’re reaching out about a project, include:

  • Your warehouse + BI stack
  • Channels you run (email / WA / push / ads)
  • Where segment or KPI definitions diverge today
  • Timeline + budget range (if you have one)

item.title: Positioning
item.description:
Joyboydata positioning report (Indonesia B2B)

0) One-line summary

Joyboydata membantu tim Growth/CRM mendefinisikan segmentasi dan metrik sekali di warehouse, lalu reuse untuk activation dan measurement di semua channel—tanpa duplikasi logic, tanpa CSV drift, dan tanpa “metrics stack” baru yang sulit dipelihara.

1) Service offers (1–2 person delivery)

Prinsip paket: (a) scope jelas dan kecil, (b) deliverable yang bisa dipakai tim internal, (c) ada “quick win” + fondasi jangka panjang, (d) cocok untuk buyer Growth/CRM/Marketing Ops.
